title: Trade frigate
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
A '''trade [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]''' was a kind of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] affiliated with the [[Galactic traders]]. All trade frigates were grounded at [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] made its move on the [[Aquilaean system]], and their [[Captain/Legends|captains]] and first officers were escorted to the [[Ministry of Transport]]. [[King/Legends|King]] [[Kayos]] of [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] sought to ensure that the guild would support his [[Planet/Legends|planet]] against the Empire through their frigates.

==Behind the scenes==
Trade frigates appeared in identical scenes in both the rough and first drafts to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]], though in the first draft they were impounded at [[Granicus]] and Aquilae was renamed [[Townowi]].
